title: Unidentified Twi'lek Jedi (Geonosis)

This '''individual''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rutian/Legends|Rutian]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the final decade of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

==Biography==
Discovered to be [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] at an early age, this Twi'lek was inducted into the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple's]] [[Jedi academy|academy]]. After years of study as a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], this individual constructed a blue-bladed [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] before completing the [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Trials of Knighthood]] and attaining the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]]. Dressing in traditional [[Jedi apparel/Legends|brown robes]], this Jedi took to wearing heavy wrist [[Gauntlet/Legends|gauntlets]].<ref name="Hasbro" />

Stationed at the Temple when Jedi [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] were sentenced to [[Death/Legends|death]] by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] on [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]], this Jedi answered [[Master of the Order/Legends|Master of the Order]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu's]] call to arms and left for the dust world immediately. Landing on the plains of Geonosis, this Twi'lek and the other two hundred-some Jedi stormed the [[Petranaki arena]] and fought against the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]] in an attempt to free the captives. While the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|battle]] was counted as a victory for the Republic, the Jedi lost the majority their original force, except for a few dozen. It is highly likely this Jedi perished in the arena as well.<ref name="Hasbro" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Jediknightarmy.jpg|thumb|right|200px]]
This Jedi's sole appearance is depicted as promotional art for an action figure set manufactured by [[Hasbro]]. The figures included are this Twi'lek Jedi, a [[Unidentified Rodian Jedi (Petranaki arena)|Rodian Jedi]], and [[Lumas Etima]]. His action figure has blue skin, while the promotional art for this set depicts him as having tannish-white skin. Also, on the promotional art, he is visible wielding a blue lightsaber, but is packaged grasping a green one.

This Twi'lek may resemble [[Norcuna]] or [[Anoon Bondara]], however no canonical link has been made between any of the characters.
